overall_light_zh: 此次牌阵带来了明朗的能量，宇宙正温柔地支持着你。
三张牌散发出积极流动的气息，这是顺势而为的好时机。
光亮的能量围绕此刻的你，拥有推动事物向前的力量。
overall_shadow_zh: 此次能量深沉而复杂，宇宙邀请你进行更深入的内在审视。
挑战性的能量浮现，但它是成长的邀请，而非惩罚。
能量较为内敛，此刻更适合停下来倾听，而非急于行动。
overall_mixed_zh: 光与影在此次牌阵中共存，这正是生命真实而完整的样子。
复杂的能量组合映照出你内心的丰富，接纳每一面的自己。
此次指引充满层次，带着耐心去细细感受每一张牌的声音。
overall_light_en: The cards bring luminous energy—the universe is gently supporting you.
An open and flowing spread—this is a good time to move forward with confidence.
Bright energy surrounds you right now. You have the power to make things happen.
overall_shadow_en: Deep and complex energy invites you to look inward with honesty and patience.
Challenging energy emerges—but remember, this is an invitation to grow, not a punishment.
The energy calls for stillness and inner listening rather than rushing forward.
overall_mixed_en: Light and shadow coexist in this spread, reflecting life in its truest, fullest form.
A layered combination of energies mirrors your inner richness—embrace every facet.
This reading holds depth. Take your time to feel what each card is saying to you.
love_prefix_zh: 关于心之所向，牌阵告诉你：
love_prefix_en: In the realm of love and connection,
Regarding matters of the heart, the cards say:
The energy around your relationships suggests:
career_prefix_en: Regarding your goals and professional path,
The energy around your work suggests:
wealth_prefix_en: In matters of wealth and abundance,
advice_zh: 今日塔罗给你的建议是：带着「{kw1}」与「{kw2}」的意识前行，让直觉成为你今天的罗盘。
宇宙通过{card_name}提醒你：{kw1}，是此刻最值得珍藏的能量。
今天，请允许自己以「{kw1}」的姿态面对一切，{card_name}在为你引路。
advice_en: Today's guidance: carry the energy of '{kw1}' and '{kw2}' with you, and let your intuition be your compass.
The universe speaks through {card_name}: '{kw1}' is the most valuable energy to hold onto right now.
Today, allow yourself to embody '{kw1}'—{card_name} is lighting your way.
